title: Unified permissions model for projects created with the Database instance API
body:
Between May 11 and May 21, 2026, Lakebase Autoscaling is rolling out a unified permissions model for new projects created with the [Database instance API](https://docs.databricks.com/api/workspace/database) or related tools (CLI, SDKs, Terraform, DABs). **Existing projects are unaffected.**

After rollout, both instance and project permissions are managed by a unified permissions layer, instead of two independent ACL sets. Existing automation that uses the Database instance API continues to work without changes.

See [Permissions (ACLs)](/aws/en/oltp/upgrade-to-autoscaling#acls).
